⚡ Interactive Calculators & Simulators

Sim-Lab

Run the numbers. Make the decision.

Explore the Sim-Lab—our library of free, interactive tools designed to help you estimate EV charging costs, plan home energy upgrades, size battery backups, and compare equipment. Every simulation is powered by the same verified data found in our guides, runs directly in your browser, and keeps your information private—nothing is saved or sent anywhere.

Free Forever No sign-ups, no paywalls, no credit cards required.
100% Interactive Instant, live results calculated entirely in your browser.
Zero Data Tracking Your entries stay local. Nothing is ever saved or sent to a server.
1200 × 675
★ Popular EV Home Charging

EV Home Charging Cost

Estimate your full-charge cost, monthly bill, and cost per mile from your real kWh rate and driving.

5 inputs · instant Open calculator →

Solar & Battery Backup Sizer

Size a solar array and battery bank to cover your home usage and outage backup goals.
